title: HOUSING COUNSELING SERVICES - 211info
text: MONEY MANAGEMENT INTERNATIONAL HOUSING COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides multiple housing counseling services, including home pre-purchase counseling, HUD-approved mortgage default counseling, and reverse mortgage counseling. -Home pre-purchase counseling: HUD-certified housing counselors review the household budget and credit report to determine how much a client can afford for a house payment, help clients weigh financing and down payment options, and help clients understand the home buying process. -Mortgage default counseling: Housing counselors work with struggling homeowners and their mortgage lenders to determine possible options for avoiding default and foreclosure. -Reverse mortgage counseling: Home Equity Conversion Mortgage (HECM) counselors work with older adults interested in tapping their equity, informing them of the impacts of the loan, the cost, and potential alternatives. The ClearPoint office in Portland partners with community organizations and businesses, including Rent Well, Home Forward, Community Action, Oregon Opportunity Network, and Oregon Jump$tart. ClearPoint credit counselors in Portland also provide educational outreach and give community presentations. 12603 SW Freeway Suite 450 Stafford, TX 77477 Eligibility: Pre-Purchase and Mortgage Default Counseling: Unrestricted Reverse Mortgage Counseling: Age 62 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (866) 889-9347 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (866) 889-9347 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or see website. Services can be provided in person, by phone, or online. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling HUD Approved Counseling Agencies Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Reverse Mortgage Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: MONEY MANAGEMENT - BANKRUPTCY COUNSELING MONEY MANAGEMENT - DEBT AND CREDIT COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MONEY MANAGEMENT INTERNATIONAL
